title: × dactylodenia vollmannii nothosubsp. vollmannii
intro: × Dactylodenia vollmannii nothosubsp. vollmannii, also known as Vollmann's Dactylodenia or × Vollmann's Dactylodenia, is a hybrid orchid species. This plant is primarily known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of × Vollmann's Dactylodenia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or supplement form, with recommended dosages varying depending on the individual's health needs and the specific preparation.
